title: Crack FAANG as a Fresher
description: A community-contributed roadmap for aspiring Software Development professionals, built by alumni who have walked this path.
milestones: [{"title": "Master Data Structures", "description": "Arrays, Linked Lists, Trees, Graphs, Heaps, Tries", "estimated_weeks": 6, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://leetcode.com", "https://visualgo.net"], "order_index": 1, "id": "m1"}, {"title": "Algorithms Deep Dive", "description": "DP, Greedy, Backtracking, BFS/DFS, Two Pointers, Sliding Window", "estimated_weeks": 6, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://neetcode.io", "https://cp-algorithms.com"], "order_index": 2, "id": "m2"}, {"title": "Solve 200 LeetCode Problems", "description": "50 Easy, 100 Medium, 50 Hard \u2014 timed practice", "estimated_weeks": 8, "type": "build", "resources": ["https://leetcode.com/studyplan/"], "order_index": 3, "id": "m3"}, {"title": "System Design Basics", "description": "Scalability, Load Balancing, Databases, Caching, CAP Theorem", "estimated_weeks": 4, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://github.com/donnemartin/system-design-primer"], "order_index": 4, "id": "m4"}, {"title": "Build 2 Full-Stack Projects", "description": "One CRUD app + one DSA-focused tool. Host on GitHub.", "estimated_weeks": 6, "type": "build", "resources": ["https://roadmap.sh"], "order_index": 5, "id": "m5"}, {"title": "Mock Interviews", "description": "10+ mock interviews on Pramp, Interviewing.io, or with peers", "estimated_weeks": 4, "type": "apply", "resources": ["https://pramp.com", "https://interviewing.io"], "order_index": 6, "id": "m6"}, {"title": "Apply and Iterate", "description": "Apply to 30+ companies. Track rejections. Iterate on weak areas.", "estimated_weeks": 4, "type": "apply", "resources": [], "order_index": 7, "id": "m7"}]

title: Become a Data Scientist in 1 Year
description: A community-contributed roadmap for aspiring Data Science professionals, built by alumni who have walked this path.
milestones: [{"title": "Python for Data Science", "description": "NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn \u2014 complete mastery", "estimated_weeks": 4, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://kaggle.com/learn"], "order_index": 1, "id": "m1"}, {"title": "Statistics & Probability", "description": "Descriptive stats, hypothesis testing, distributions, Bayesian basics", "estimated_weeks": 4, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://statsquest.org"], "order_index": 2, "id": "m2"}, {"title": "Machine Learning Fundamentals", "description": "Regression, Classification, Clustering, Evaluation Metrics, Cross-validation", "estimated_weeks": 6, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://scikit-learn.org", "https://ml-course.github.io"], "order_index": 3, "id": "m3"}, {"title": "SQL Mastery", "description": "Complex joins, window functions, CTEs \u2014 LeetCode SQL 50", "estimated_weeks": 3, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://mode.com/sql-tutorial/"], "order_index": 4, "id": "m4"}, {"title": "Complete 3 Kaggle Competitions", "description": "At least one tabular, one NLP, one image. Target top 30%.", "estimated_weeks": 8, "type": "build", "resources": ["https://kaggle.com/competitions"], "order_index": 5, "id": "m5"}, {"title": "Deep Learning (Optional but Recommended)", "description": "Neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, Transformers basics using PyTorch", "estimated_weeks": 6, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://fast.ai", "https://d2l.ai"], "order_index": 6, "id": "m6"}, {"title": "Build a Portfolio of 3 Projects", "description": "One EDA project, one ML app (Streamlit), one NLP project", "estimated_weeks": 6, "type": "build", "resources": [], "order_index": 7, "id": "m7"}]

title: Cloud & DevOps Engineer Roadmap
description: A community-contributed roadmap for aspiring DevOps professionals, built by alumni who have walked this path.
milestones: [{"title": "Linux & Networking Fundamentals", "description": "Shell scripting, file system, networking basics, SSH", "estimated_weeks": 3, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://linuxjourney.com"], "order_index": 1, "id": "m1"}, {"title": "Git & Version Control", "description": "Branching, merging, GitHub Actions basics", "estimated_weeks": 2, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://learngitbranching.js.org"], "order_index": 2, "id": "m2"}, {"title": "Docker Mastery", "description": "Images, containers, Dockerfile, Docker Compose, multi-stage builds", "estimated_weeks": 3, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://docs.docker.com/get-started/"], "order_index": 3, "id": "m3"}, {"title": "Kubernetes (K8s)", "description": "Pods, Deployments, Services, ConfigMaps, Helm charts", "estimated_weeks": 5, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://kubernetes.io/docs/tutorials/"], "order_index": 4, "id": "m4"}, {"title": "AWS Core Services", "description": "EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, VPC, IAM \u2014 get AWS Solutions Architect Associate cert", "estimated_weeks": 8, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://aws.amazon.com/training/"], "order_index": 5, "id": "m5"}, {"title": "CI/CD Pipeline Project", "description": "Build a full pipeline: GitHub \u2192 Jenkins/GitHub Actions \u2192 Docker \u2192 K8s", "estimated_weeks": 4, "type": "build", "resources": [], "order_index": 6, "id": "m6"}, {"title": "Infrastructure as Code", "description": "Terraform \u2014 provision AWS infra, state management, modules", "estimated_weeks": 4, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://learn.hashicorp.com/terraform"], "order_index": 7, "id": "m7"}]

title: Product Manager at a Startup

milestones: [{"title": "PM Fundamentals", "description": "Product lifecycle, PRDs, user stories, roadmaps, OKRs", "estimated_weeks": 3, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://www.productschool.com/blog/"], "order_index": 1, "id": "m1"}, {"title": "SQL for PMs", "description": "Write queries to pull your own data \u2014 funnels, retention, cohorts", "estimated_weeks": 3, "type": "learn", "resources": ["https://mode.com/sql-tutorial/"], "order_index": 2, "id": "m2"}, {"title": "User Research Methods", "description": "Interviews, surveys, usability testing, affinity mapping", "estimated_weeks": 2, "type": "learn", "resources": [], "order_index": 3, "id": "m3"}, {"title": "Metrics & Analytics", "description": "DAU, MAU, churn, NPS, AARRR framework, A/B testing basics", "estimated_weeks": 3, "type": "learn", "resources": [], "order_index": 4, "id": "m4"}, {"title": "Build a Product Case Study", "description": "Identify a problem in an existing app. Write a full PRD + mock wireframes.", "estimated_weeks": 4, "type": "build", "resources": ["https://figma.com"], "order_index": 5, "id": "m5"}, {"title": "PM Internship or Freelance", "description": "Apply to PM internships at startups.
